description.zh-cn: 领券中心：复用「优惠券(Coupon)」插件的券池，提供前台领券中心列表、一键领取(每人限领)、我的券包接口。会员领取后凭券码在结算使用，领取记录与统计在后台查看。需先安装 Coupon 插件。
description.en: Coupon Center: reuses the Coupon plugin's pool to offer a storefront coupon list, one-click claim (per-customer limit) and a my-coupons API. Claimed codes are used at checkout. Requires the Coupon plugin installed.
